MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-27-2007 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. PARTIES STIPULATED TO THE CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/14/07 IS CONTINUED TO 8/6/07 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
